user_comment: Not the color I ordered. Update please read I like the way these jeans fit they are made of cotton and they do not have any stretch. They are like the kind I wore back in the day. They are made to last.. But I ordered the lite color and obviously I was sent the wrong color these are much darker. I really wanted the lighter color for an event I was going to but now it’s too late. I’m not sure if I want to send them back or not because these kind of pants are hard to find. Plus who knows if I would get the color I want even though I couldn’t get them in time when I needed them. I took too stars off because I was sent the wrong color. Other than that I really like the jeans. For reference I’m about 5”9 and weigh 130 pounds I ordered the size 3-36 and they fit perfectly. Update… I decided to keep the one that they sent me that was the Wong color. I tried again and I got the right color this time 😁😁 but these don’t fit the same as the darker ones. They are a little bit big in the behind. The length is great it’s hard to find jeans that are long enough. I have washed them 2 times in hot water hoping they would shrink just a little (I have lost 8 pounds since I posted my review on the darker!(I wish it was more) I’m happy they didn’t shrink in the length.The bottom of the pants keep rolling up I’m not sure why. I’m Trying to gain some weight so maybe they will fit better. Overall I like the pants if I gain too much weight I might need some that are bigger and I will definitely come back and buy more of these pants.

In love!! But wait.... EDITED REVIEW*** Umm... I'm not quite sure what happened, but I decided to order these Cowboy Cut in Blue because the Black ones were perfect. These jeans are the exact same size, but the blue ones are HUGE. They don't fit. Additionally I believe these were a return because they came with no tags and they feel like they've been washed. I'm disappointed. But my black jeans are still great. So these are some TRUE 100% cotton Jeans. There is no give and zero stretch which is what I wanted. After looking at the size chart I decided to get a size 1×30. I am 5'4, 125lbs and wear a size 25 in Levis 501s. In my opinion these jeans fit and look similar. I am definitely glad I got the size 1 because the zero definitely would have been too small. I can't wait to break these in and I'll definitely be getting another pair in a different color

Great jeans! I was a little skeptical about buying these pants because I seen the reviews about sizing. I had no problem with sizing. I’m 5’5 and about 190-200lbs and a size 15/16 in other jeans so I decided to get a size 15x34 and I’m glad I did. The jeans were a little tight but I’m also bloated from aunt flow being in town lol. They hugged all my curves in the right way. They’re comfortable enough to dance in all night and they’re kinda stretchable overall the quality is good for the price. The length is perfect with boots! I’m happy with my purchase.

Sizing and sewing is off My measurements for reference: 27.5” waist, 40” hips. Bought a 7 based on the size chart, it was way too big. Bought a 5, and they’re still too big. Also, the seam for the side of the leg is sewn crooked and literally in the front. I’m going to try a 3, because these would be so cute without these issues. They’re also insanely comfy. I’m 5’6 and got a 34” inseam, and it’s the perfect length for boots. Edit: the 3 in the same color (stonewash) was bigger than the 5, yet the 3 in a different color (prewash) fit perfectly. Guess I’ll try a zero in the first color now. 🤦🏽‍♀️ Edit #2: the zero fit like a zero. The 3 was bigger than the 5, and the 5 is too big. Guess I’m just not meant to have these jeans.

The quality is awesome! COMFORT LEVEL is HIGH! I ordered a pair of women’s casual high waisted jeans by DOKOTOO in blue size 6. I am 5’4” tall, and weigh about 125lbs and these fit extremely well. The fabric is a blend of 72% cotton, 26% polyester, and 2% elastane. It’s quite stretchy when you move it sideways, but not much when you move it up and down. The stretch goes sideways, making the waist incredibly stretchy. I find this feature really awesome, to me stretching around the waist is important, especially after eating. These light blue jeans have a distressed look that goes down each leg and also in the back upper area. I absolutely love the distressed look. These jeans feature a design on the front pockets, both of which are functional. Additionally, there are two more usable pockets located in the back, on either side. They come with a zipper and a metal button closure. In my opinion, they have EXTRA wide legs that extend all the way down, making them incredibly comfortable! The stitching throughout the jeans is exceptional, making the quality very good. I think these jeans are a bit pricey, but the quality is awesome!

Stretchy jeans that are comfortable. I ordered the size 10 in the color Ashleigh blue and these fit a little big. For reference, I am 5’3 and weigh 153lbs with a size 30 waist. The jeans are a nice thicker stretchy material and feel super comfortable on. They washed and dried without any fading or shrinking. They do run a little long on me but I’ll wear them with boots so it should be fine. These jeans are comparable to your local mall department store women jeans. The only issue is that they run a little big, so try going down a size since they are stretchy. Other than that, they are wide leg and the design is super cute. They are also averagely priced, so if you are looking for wide jeans, try these!

Perfect fit. Very comfy. The perfect combo of stretch, strength, thickness, maneuverability, breathability, and comfort. I love the edge of the pockets has this cool hem. The pockets are comfy and can fit my whole hand! Rare for anything in women’s clothing. I was honestly not expecting these to be flattering or fit anywhere near my size except up at the belt line because of the cut/style of the jeans. But they actually look really good. Due to the dark color and the lighting in my house, it was hard to get great pictures. But just take my word for it. They fit true to size. They also aren’t high-waters. I’m 5’8” and they’re not capris on me. I would still prefer a long, but these didn’t leave me lacking. Absolutely would recommend. Worth getting again. 5 stars

Not for tall people These jeans fit true to size. They fit a little higher than a mid-waist rise on me, and they are not as long as you would think based on the photos. I'm 5'6" and these are long enough that I could wear with sneakers, but any heeled shoe would make these too short. Tall people will have a more cropped look with this wide leg cut. The fabric does have a little stretch to it and is comfortable to wear. These are also machine washable so they don't need any special laundering effort. I love the cut and the fit, and the color is as described. They have a little design on the front pockets, but no design on the back pockets. The stitching is the same black down the seams of the leg, so the only contrast is that white stich design on the front pockets. Overall, I'm happy with the quality and fit of these and would recommend them to others.

Flattering and super comfy/stretchy! Pleasantly surprised by this pair of pants! I couldn’t tell if they would look weird or be low quality but I love the look! The pants are not super thick but that’s nice, especially for warmer weather. They are super flexible and comfy to wear. I carry weight in my hips, thighs and I feel like these are flattering for my build. I got a medium which is TTS for me. I’m 5’5 and I’d say the crop fit hits me just right. The price seems good to me too!

Great wide-leg jeans! Fantastic wide-leg jeans that are comfortable and trendy. The seaming, stitching and detail on these jeans are perfect. The fit is true-to-size (I'm 5'4" and 128 pounds). The black color is deep and rich with a washed hue for effect. There is a small amount of stretch to the material so the waist is not binding or tight, and there is no elastic on the back of the waist, so the lines are very clean. The material has a full, rich denim feel yet is soft on the skin. The small pockets on the front add just enough dimension for the overall style and do not add any bulk. The zipper is high-quality and glides with ease. The legs are cut wide, falling from the lower hip to the hem, and this creates a thinning silhouette. The jeans fall just above my ankles and I wore these to the office with a medium-heel pump to further elongate my legs and received many compliments. Overall, these jeans are a great value for the money.

The material has a full, rich denim feel yet is soft on the skin. The small pockets on the front add just enough dimension for the overall style and do not add any bulk. The zipper is high-quality and glides with ease. The legs are cut wide, falling from the lower hip to the hem, and this creates a thinning silhouette. The jeans fall just above my ankles and I wore these to the office with a medium-heel pump to further elongate my legs and received many compliments. Overall, these jeans are a great value for the money.

Soft and stretchy, true to size, great for shorter frame I am on the shorter side and have always purchased crop pants to wear them as regular length jeans. The crop on this GRAPENT fits me like ankle jeans, not full length. I am 5 ft 2 inches and about 115-120 pounds and the medium was a bit large on me. I would need a belt but I think I would still be able to wear it. The small would have definitely fit better. The jeans are stretchy and soft, which I love. The jeans are wide legged, but not overly wide. I would categorize it more like jeans and not trouser jeans. I have worn the jeans with casual tennis shoes and they are adorable.

Perfect Ankle-Skimming Fit & Exceptional Quality! (5'2" approved!) I am absolutely thrilled with these Grapent Cropped Jeans in size Medium. They are an awesome pair of stretch jeans and the overall construction is fantastic. Quality & Construction: The material is comfortably thick, giving them a high-quality feel without being stiff. I inspected the seams closely and found them tight and the stitching impeccable—zero loose threads anywhere. It's clear these are built to last. Fit & Comfort: The stretch element is exactly right. They hug my butt and hips beautifully, providing a flattering silhouette while the elastane gives enough give to make them incredibly comfortable for all-day wear. They truly move with you. Color & Length (A Note for Petites!): The color is spot-on, exactly matching the product photos. Although these are labeled as "cropped," at 5'2", they hit me right at my ankle. I actually love this length! It’s the perfect hemline to let all my favorite ankle boots and dress shoes really shine without having to cuff or tailor them. If you're looking for high-quality, comfortable, and flattering jeans, especially if you are on the shorter side, look no further. Highly recommend! IN LOVE with these jeans! These are FANTASTIC jeans! Stylish, flattering, and ultra comfortable -- what more can you ask for?? Seriously, they feel like yoga pants -- they are that soft, stretchy, and comfortable. So easy to zip up and with no pinching anywhere. And yet they have a great structure to them so they'll be absolutely perfect for work. I'm loving the wide leg. Great proportions. The two small pockets in the front are on-trend and flattering. The length is great -- I'm 5'6" and love that they are nice and long. Will look great with heels or flats depending upon my mood! They would accommodate a tall person, I feel (but can't speak to that personally). Might be too long for someone 5'4" or shorter. I love the color, too -- the dye is perfectly done and gives them a great look (some jeans come with weird faded patches on the rear end, but not these). I can't think of anything I don't love about these jeans. BUY THEM. I am planning to order more colors. These are a total win!

True to size, great length Levi's cinch barrel jeans were a 1st-time purchase success, a rarity for online purchases of pants/jeans. No stretch to these: as a size 10/12 (between sizes, sort of a 10.5), 155# / 5'5" I purchased the 31 (my usual go-to size) & they fit well, snug but not too snug on my measured 34" waist. I'm never sure why size 31's fit me when my measured waist is 34", can be confusing to purchase items online when using size charts. Option to cinch these tighter will be useful to some out there, using the buttons on the waistband.These are high waisted with a 13.5" rise, and the length of these from bottom of the leg hem to crotch seam was slightly over 31" yet the cut of these jeans makes the length perfect on me (touches floor, as pictured on model) when almost 32" would drag the ground in other jeans such as a wide leg jean. Longer lengths are hard to find in a barrel jean so I appreciate the length on these. Will wash on cold & hang to dry to ensure no shrinking occurs.Not super flattering in the rear view but not the worst either, I guess that's the "baggy" part of the jeans' description, however I do not believe baggy should equal 'dropped a load in my pants'..... these do not look like that, fortunately. If I hadn't purchased these on sale however, I would consider sending back due to the non-definition of the butt, after all what's a pair of jeans for except to flatter the butt? If you're familiar with a name brand barrel jean from a company whose initials are FP these fit differently in the back than those.Everybody is shaped differently so you just have to try these to see if they'll work for you. Recommended!

Ordered a Size Large. For reference I’m 5’ 7 1/2” and 169 lbs. Put them on today for “Jean Friday” work day. They fit a little snug in the waist this morning but after wearing for about 2 hours they stretched out (in waist area). Speaking of the waist - it’s perfect! High wide waist, 3 metal buttons plus a zipper. The length is perfect with my UGG Boots. For Spring they’d work with flats or sandals (I live in SC). I plan to wash in cold water, fluff up a bit in dryer on low and then air dry. Might need to iron after that but not sure. FYI - I’ll be 70 in a few weeks! Still want to be stylish 😊.
Super cute and stretchy. Love these. They are stretchy so I could have sized down. A bit loose. I’m a size 14 200lbs 5’7. Thought washing would change sizing a shrink a bit but it didn’t.

Found my perfect jeans!! I am so excited. I searched so long for a wide leg jean with slash pockets and ordered these in blue denim to see if they would work. I love hanging my hands in my pockets and the slash pocket with patch back pockets were exactly what I wanted. I got them the very next day and they were perfect! For how short I am, I have crazy long legs and these were exactly the right length. Since I was so happy with the blue jeans I thought I might try a second pair in this great green color. I was worried they might have that icky whisker fading on the front like I had seen on some of the customer pictures of the black ones. The green ones just arrived and they are perfect, no fading and they fit exactly the same as the blue jeans. They have a perfect amount of stretch to make them comfortable and they don’t really stretch out after wearing them. I realize that last year I purchased a four patch pocket pair of lightweight jeans that are also Sidefeel and I like them a lot too. I’m 5”3 but have super long legs and a super short waist, so finding jeans long enough is hard. I weigh 138lbs and I ordered a size 8. The other colors are tempting me.

Flattering, nice fit *may not be great for big bottoms or tall girls I really like these jeans. Very cute front design that’s a little different. Tummy control too. I’m 5’4”, about 150lbs, pear shaped and these are flattering on my shape. I got the size 10 and they are true to size. I love that they actually fit my waist as most jeans leave a gap. Please note that these might be a bit short if you’re taller than 5’4” as they are just right on me wearing a flat shoe. Another thing to note is they are a smidge short in the crotch in that the middle seam fits snuggly/high. (You may have to adjust them out your backside). However this makes them look better on my bum as I don’t have much going on in that area. I would definitely buy them again!

Buy a size down… The waist section runs a bit large Good material, not that stretchy, not that dick. But they are comfortable. They’re very flattering to the curves. Especially the posterior curves. So if you’ve got a little bit in the trunk, and you’ve got a nice round shape to it, and you’ve got some round curvy hips, these are the jeans for you. But I would caution you to check their sizes, and maybe be considering buying a size down as these ran a little bit big. If you are short, you’ll need to hem the bottom of these jeans as they’re a little bit long, but if you’re in the tall range like a 5’7 Ish, These jeans would fit perfect on you. The print is nice, but it’s not as pronounced as it looks in the photos. Overall, this is a good jean. If I could, I would get 4 1/2 stars.

Great for taller full figure women- heavier like work jeans I think I am more of a full figure- I have a butt and hips with a smaller waist. I bought size 18- my normal size these fit perfectly. The denim is more like 90s denim but with some stretch and they are high waisted with a boot cut/flare. They give Y2K vibes. If you are full figured and like high waist boot cut these are for you! I own a farm and really struggle to find a denim that I can work in and still be comfortable- these are perfect. Thicker denim offers more protection, these are comfy for riding or working. They also look nice enough to wear out. They are a great multi use jeans. These are made for taller women, I am 5’7” so not to tall but if I am not in my work boots they drag, I have a 31” inseam ( longer legs with a short torso) if you are taller with hips/ butt these are for you. I can see why shorter women do not like them, or women with small butts find them uncomfortable. If you have a pan fold and a butt these are great- order your true size, the stretch does loosen after a few hours of wearing so if you are in between sizes order down, if you are a smaller figure you will also probably want to order down a size. These are the best jeans I have found for my current size in a long time. My new favorite.

Great jeans but a few caveats These jeans are as described with a couple caveats. Amazon recommends size 20 for me based on my past purchases but these jeans are too big around the waist and I’m a thick girl. The inseam length is as stated in the description. My other area of concern is the ‘front rise’ the description said 9.5” but these measured 10.5”. These are not a true mid rise jean. They come up above my belly button. I’ll keep them and alter them after washed but I would recommend if you’re short-waisted that you look for a different jean if it’s important to you. Also, consider ordering down one size. I’m 5’5” and 205# my true waist measurement is 44”. Hope this review helps.

Love ❤️ love ❤️ love ❤️ Well so far from opening the bag and unfolding these jeans and putting them on I was falling in love with each step. Like most women here I'm sure buying clothes online is so stressful and what if , but we have such desires and hopes. Most online models don't always look like every woman and we have to read all these dang reviews . Well I'm 5'7 and probably between 190-210 maybe... haven't weighed myself in a long time. Usually between a12 and 14 but the last pair of size 13 jeans I've ordered have just been PERFECT 🥰. I wear boots for casual out wear and I wear boots for work so threes are a 13long and standing on my toes the bottom of these jeans just hit flatly on the ground. PERFECTION. Buy these jeans especially when amazon has them on a sale. So so worth it. I'm so glad I have another color coming in the mail tomorrow!! I really hope this review helps other woman. I never post pictures of what I buy.. but these I just had to because they are great!

Comfortable, Stylish Wide-Leg Jeans with a Flattering Fit I ordered these wide-leg denim jeans in blue, size 10, after checking the size chart. I usually fall between sizes 8–10, and with my waist around 30–31 inches, the size 10 fits perfectly. The fit feels true to size and very comfortable. I’m 5'2", and the length is slightly long for my height, but it’s not an issue at all when worn with shoes. From the product photos, it seems the longer length is intentional, and it actually adds to the overall look. The fabric has a nice amount of stretch—soft to the touch yet structured enough to hold its shape. The straight-leg, wide-cut style is very on-trend right now, and I love how effortlessly stylish it looks. The blue wash is classic and easy to style, and the cross-front pocket detail adds a unique design element that makes these jeans stand out. Although they’re designed as high-waisted jeans, I prefer wearing them slightly lower at my natural waist, which worked great for me and felt more flattering. Even after sitting for long hours at work, the jeans stayed comfortable with no tightness or irritation. The natural creasing that forms with wear actually adds to that relaxed denim look. These jeans are very versatile and easy to dress up or down. I’ve worn them to work and can just as easily imagine pairing them with sneakers for a casual day or heels for a more polished outfit. Overall, they’re stylish, comfortable, and well-made—perfect for everyday wear, office days, or casual outings. I’m really happy with this purchase and would definitely recommend them!

The fabric has a nice amount of stretch—soft to the touch yet structured enough to hold its shape. The straight-leg, wide-cut style is very on-trend right now, and I love how effortlessly stylish it looks. The blue wash is classic and easy to style, and the cross-front pocket detail adds a unique design element that makes these jeans stand out. Although they’re designed as high-waisted jeans, I prefer wearing them slightly lower at my natural waist, which worked great for me and felt more flattering. Even after sitting for long hours at work, the jeans stayed comfortable with no tightness or irritation. The natural creasing that forms with wear actually adds to that relaxed denim look. These jeans are very versatile and easy to dress up or down. I’ve worn them to work and can just as easily imagine pairing them with sneakers for a casual day or heels for a more polished outfit. Overall, they’re stylish, comfortable, and well-made—perfect for everyday wear, office days, or casual outings. I’m really happy with this purchase and would definitely recommend them!

My new favorite jeans! First off, I prefer high-waisted slacks that work with my blouses to keep my tummy area covered! That’s just me. I’ve never had jeans with a two-button closure before, but it works fine. The buttons are easy to use and comfortable. The pair of them also provide a bit more tummy control imo. I ordered the Iceland Blue which is a light blue wash, pretty and versatile. These jeans look and fit well on me; I’ve received lots of compliments when I’ve worn them. I ordered my typical size which is sometimes loose. These jeans fit me like a comfortable glove. The fabric is soft and stretches. I honestly don’t feel like I’m wearing jeans. Incidentally, I’m 5’5”, and the length is perfect for me. The jeans touch my shoes without dragging on the floor. These jeans are well-made with straight seams and no loose or rogue threads. I look forward to getting a lot of wear in these.

Comfortable tummy control jeans I wanted a pair of black jeans and these mostly fit the bill. They are stretchy in the right places and pretty comfortable. The legs are wide, but not too wide that they look ridiculous. The length is absolutely perfect for 5’6” inch me. With shoes on I won’t have to worry about the bottoms dragging on the ground. The tummy control feature is a tad tight, but not super restrictive. It stretches and you can breathe in them. My main complaint is the fading. I wanted black jeans. The pictures showed that they were slightly faded on the thighs. In person, they look very faded, so to me that was very disappointing. That’s just a personal preference thing. Overall, these jeans are comfortable, very good quality and they look good.

Cute, comfortable jeans that fit well. These jeans are cute and comfortable. I received the color bluing and it is as shown in the photos on the Amazon page. It looks really nice with the whispering and the slight fade on the legs.I ordered my usual pants size which also aligned well with the size chart and these jeans fit really well. I am 5 ft 6 inches tall and usually wear a 29 inch inseam. They fit around my midsection well (I have a 0.8 hip to waist ratio). They are not too tight and are high waisted enough that there is no muffin top. Better yet, there is NO gap in the waistband when wearing them.The fabric is stretchy but nicely weighted so they don’t bag out after some wear. They are a nice midweight that will work well from warmer winter weather into the spring. I look forward to wearing them a lot.

My new favorite jeans I am so excited over these jeans! I usually have a very hard time getting jeans/slacks that fit. But these are actually perfect! At 5'10" tall and 130 pounds, I ordered the size 12. Perfection. The waist is just right, crotch fit is perfect, hips and butt area are tight enough but not too tight, legs are somewhat wide but not ridiculously baggy, and the length is good falling below my ankles but not dragging on the floor. I was so thrilled when I tried these on. I like the brown color as it is a welcome change from blue or black denim, and will go great with white, black, blue, pink, beige, green, or almost any color top, really. The material is thick enough to be sturdy, but not too heavy as some jeans tend to be. 63% cotton and 32 % polyester with 3.5 % regenerated fiber and 1.5 % elastane assures that they won't shrink very much in the wash, if at all. That little bit of stretch gives a flattering fit. The 2 buttons at the waist gives a touch of unique style. I just love these jeans, and they are my new favorites.

Utterly gorgeous- as both cropped & capris! About as close to perfection as possible (especially given my wonky body shape)! I’m 5’3”-5’4” (right smack on the line between regular and petite). My weight fluctuates a lot, but currently around 175-185. As pants are concerned, I’m middle heavy, but with a hourglass shape overall (technically speaking). However, my legs are disproportionately thin. This all obviously makes pants shopping really difficult. Stretchiness is my friend! After exchanging a size 15, I landed on a size 13, two sizes smaller than the size 17 as recommended by Amazon, and one size smaller than the 15 I’d normally wear in juniors’ sizes, (12-14 in ladies) so when you read they run big, believe it. To my delight, the 13 fits as well as I can expect (they’re a bit more snug in the waist than I’d prefer, but I’m on the heavier side of my ever-fluctuating weight, so it won’t be long before they’re perfect- and until then they do a good job of keeping my belly under control). Length-wise, in the full length Wallflower “luscious curvy” fit flare jeans, I have to get short length, or have them hemmed, as they’re way too long on me. But the great thing about these are that they are the perfect length w/one cuff (as worn by the models) to wear as cropped-style, and with a couple cuffs become super cute capris! But the crowning jewel (yes, a shameless pun) has to be the rhinestone embellishments! I will bedazzle ANYTHING, but you don’t have to be obsessed with sparkles to appreciate these pants. They’re beautiful, but not over the top. You can dress them up for a night out, or down for a casual summer barbecue. Lastly, I’m on a really tight budget, so I had two concerns: first being which style to buy (bc I’d have bought them all if I could)- after much thought and difficulty finding a similar design to ‘Clarke’ on any full length styles (as I could the others) I decided on them. Second, I saw they were available for just $15 as “Used: Like New” with the description of ‘Condition consistent with having been tried on but not worn.’” Given that they were being sold & shipped by Amazon, I had enough faith to give them a try and return them if necessary but they’re indistinguishable from being brand new! They were already a great deal at full price, but if you see your size in the “tried on” condition, go for it- I sure am glad I did! -Colleen Jane

Wow I hate buying clothes. I hate trying on clothes at the store. I have two pairs of solid jeans that are the exact same from Walmart. Every other pair I had busted from the thigh chub rubs! I needed a new outfit for blink 182 concert next week! These jeans are seriously perfect! I usually wear size 14 in jeans (at least from wmart) and that was how I determined I would wing it and get 16 since they were the closest in measurements. They fit like a glove! PERFECT! I love them and will definitely be getting more in other colors! 😍 I am always up and down between 185-200, 5”5 with most of the fat in my stomach area and 16 fit great!

Another solid pair of Levi’s, runs small though I like these, they’re a good pair of Levi’s, what else can I say? They’re definitely cropped (obviously) and on me they’re verging on capri pants (I’m 5’9” though). I don’t mind this though, they’re nice for summer and I guarantee capri pants will officially be back in at some point. Lol That said, I do think these run small overall. I’m usually a 29 or 30 in Levi’s. If the jeans have any stretch in them then I will wear a 29, but for the non-stretch 100% cotton 501s, I wear a 30. Other reviewers have also said that these run small so I ordered a 30 even though these have 1% elastane. I’m glad I did because they definitely fit more snug around the waist than my other size 30 Levi’s 501s that I have. They’re also snug around my legs, especially for being 501s. They make my booty look good though, lol. I definitely recommend to size up on these. Edit: after wearing them for a few hours, they have loosened up a little bit.

Just buy them! These are your full 100% cotton sturdy and well worth it. I absolutely love these jeans I'm in my upper 30's with a 7 and 3 year old so these jeans hide my "mom pooch" and are very comfortable they land right at my belly button. Just for size reference I am 5'2 and weigh 130-135, these crop above my ankle, to me they are perfect length. I went by the Levi's size chart and did not listen to the reviews of size up, I went by that chart and glad I did. When I first put them on I was like oh I should have sized up but after wearing for a short time they fit perfectly! Remember these are 100% cotton, they are not stretchy like the jeans we've been wearing for years. They do mold to your body after wearing, they do no shrink but they will be a little tighter for a little bit after washing/drying which I do not do until the jeans are visibly dirty. They will eventually mold so perfectly to your body you will not want to wear any other jeans. These are now my go to jeans, whether I'm dressing down or dressing them up. I can't say enough good things about them. I'm just so happy to finally have good quality jeans that are going to last forever!!

Faded Quickly and Not Comfortable I had high hopes for these jeans, but they were a little disappointing. I took them on our Christmas vacation trip to the UK and Ireland, but ended up not wearing them very often because they were not very comfortable. The waist band feels rough and itchy and doesn’t hug my curves like other high waisted jeans do. I am only 5’2” so I had to cuff them, but it just felt bulky and not flattering. I just didn’t feel my best in these jeans so they will probably get donated very soon.

Super comfy but very long I ordered these because of how comfortable they looked and the price point was pretty decent. After receiving them, they are definitely very high waisted and definitely very long. I’m only 5’3, and I would definitely have to pay to get these altered. So one negative, but I often expect length will be that way. As for comfort, they are like wearing jogger pants that are a bit more structured. Still very comfortable. For me, I do carry weight in my hips, so they do clean a little bit more there. But I feel overall they are pretty flattering. They also do feel decently warm as well. Overall, a nice pair of comfortable pants to wear casually out with sneakers or even maybe dress it up with some ballet flats and a nicer top. I probably wouldn’t wear it out to a nice dinner, but definitely out running errands during the day.

Get a little tummy control in trendy, soft, lightweight stretch denim When I first opened these, I thought "Oh no, how did we get the size THAT wrong?" I double and triple checked everything, and yes, they are the size they're supposed to be. Well, they stretch, so try them on. I was skeptical as I pulled them up all the way and . . they packed in a lot of my overweight, slimming me, and ever so comfortably. Sold. But so long! It's the trend now, to have your pants puddle around your feet. I'll probably hem them up a bit but in the meantime, they look great with my two-inch heel mules. They come out of the wash beautifully. They're much lighter than regular denim, but they're still substantial. And they're soft. Back to the size; I ordered Large based on Amazon's recommendation and didn't look at the size chart, being in a hurry. As it turned out, the Large really is a bit small, though I wear it comfortably. I'm 5/5" and 160 pounds. Skip the size chart link at the top and scroll down to the seller's size chart on the listing. I'll probably get at least one more pair of these in another color.

Quality pull on jeans - very high waisted These high waisted pull on jeans are really nice, very good quality, and look pretty good on, I’m just not sure they are for my body type. I am an apple shape and carry all my weight in my postpartum belly. Based on the size chart I ordered a medium, and they fit well (5’7, 150). These are so incredibly high waisted, almost to the bottom of my ribcage. Unfortunately I puff out a little below the waist band. That is not the fault of the jeans, it is my body type. But they definitely snatch you if you like that pinch waist feeling. The fabric is really nice, heavy, but not as stiff as some denim. I love the length, sometimes jeans just hit my ankle, but these go to the tops of my shoes. All the pockets are functional. I will be wearing these with something like a longer sweater or cardigan to cover the belly part. Overall these are really great pull on jeans, but women with an hourglass shape can probably pull these off better.

High waist, high quality real cotton jeans, comfortable. These jeans fit amazing. They are the perfect high waist and look great with a shirt tucked in. These are the 34 inseam. I am little under 5’4”. Just enough length to wear boots and not have high waters. They are comfortable to sit in all day as well. I have not rode in them, but would definitely think they would be perfect all day, the high waist sits up enough and they don’t fall down, especially in the back. This particular Jean is less stretchy, which is what I want. They feel like real jeans, not the Lycra stretchy jeans. They are very durable and are definitely rip resistance due to the higher quality cotton. I have a lighter color pair that are the same material and I wear the heck out of them. They’ve held up all year with wearing them constantly. Please don’t judge my bad mirror picture, it was all I had of these.

Pleasantly Surprised, 🐱 Friendly They're new-stiff and make my butt look a little flat, but they feel pretty nice. I'm 5'6, ±215lbs and this is a 33x34. I'll probably get the short length and then decide which to keep. I'm not sure if they shrink after the wash, but they stretch fairly nice when you squat. I tried to take ok pictures to show. I've recently gained 40lbs so I can wear a 14-18 depending on who makes the jeans 🙄. That being said, they're 🐱 friendly, the zipper is smooth and they have FULL sized pockets!!! Heavy on the 🐱 friendly though!!! That's been one of the worst things to consider when looking for jeans.

Awesome Jeans for Petite ladies!!! I love these jeans!! Wow! Talk about perfection… the denim is ultra stretchy but absolutely does not lose its shape. High comfy waisted and perfect length. I’m 5’0 and they are right to the shoe with a 2 in heel. They’re very flattering and the wide leg with fitted waist makes me look tall! For reference, I’m 5’0 and 106 lbs. the 4 is great. I probably could’ve gotten the 2 but the waist is fitted so I didn’t want to be uncomfortable. You cannot go wrong with these jeans. I just love them.

Truly comfortable and stylish..love them. I really didn’t think these would work but I was pleasantly surprised. I’m 5 ft..about 138 lbs. it’s really hard to find jeans that look good on me and avoid that sloppy look. These are so comfortable…stretchy but hold their shape. I bought a size 6 and they fit perfect. I ordered another pair in a size 8 which also fit well..just a little more room in the waist. The length is good with boots or platforms. A little too long for flats. I live in Tx and we don’t wear jeans much in the summer, but these work well for spring, fall and winter. Not too light or too heavy. Love the material, and the way the pockets are made.

Very Stretchy in Waist/Hips - Good Quality - Comfortable Cicy Bell Cropped High Waisted Stretchy Straight Leg Jeans, SIZE 12, COLOR WASH BLUE: I’m 5’2” 167lbs, 36” Waist, 41” Hip. I’ve recently lost weight and have been wearing 10/12 or M/L in jeans/pants. I’m not that curvy on the bottom. The SIZE 12 are way too big. These jeans have a lot of stretch in the waist and hips. I am able to fit both my arms down either side (see photos). So, I did what anyone else would do…immediately order a Size 10 and a Size 8 to verify which fits better. The size 10 fits better overall but after wearing them for a couple of minutes, I found that they stretched out too much giving me that unwanted jean pooch. So, believe it or not, the size 8 fits great and I have room to breathe, squat, bend, not tight! I love the way these jeans look. I am wearing size 12 in photos. CHECK MEASUREMENTS – VERY STRETCHY WAIST/HIPS. Would recommend.

Cicy Bell Womens High Waisted Jeans These jeans are so comfy and look good. I ordered a 12 according to the size chart. I think these run a tad bit big and because of the very stretchy material of these jeans, I probably should have ordered a 10. At 5'2" the length on these were perfect for me as regular length jeans. I am very happy with that though because I have a very hard time finding jeans that are not too long. Possibly because these are so stretchy and slightly big on me, when I am wearing these, they as comfortable as wearing sweatpants.

My Mom Couldn't Be More Pleased At the time of review, the price was: $49.99 which seems a bit high for these. My mom loves these. She's 5' 0" and not only did they fit exactly as expected, since she's shorter they look like flared jeans and work really well. She wears them all the time now. They are comfortable for moving around and getting stuff done and the cut is very stylish. They aren't very stretchy so you'll want to size them well. The color is very close to the listing picture. The stitching looks great. They've already been through the wash a few times and they are holding up super well (as most jeans do).

Roomy, comfy and super cute!! These cropped jeans are AWESOME! I chose the dark blue and they were beautiful! It was a true dark blue denim and they did not fade when washed. I am 5’4 so they fit a tad long so I rolled the ends and they worked perfect. They are stretchy, roomy and super comfy! I have ended up liking them so much, I bout another pair and plan to buy a third pair. As for size, I thought they ran true to size. All in all, I highly recommend these cropped jeans - you won’t be disappointed!!

More Mid-Rise than Low-Rise, but Great Overall I like these jeans a lot. They feel great, with the perfect amount of stretch. They aren’t quite as low rise as I’d expected though, falling about an inch above my hip bones, but otherwise are great. They’re not too baggy and not too long. I’m 5’3 and in flat shoes they drag a tag but would probably be fine wearing a bigger boot. They fit true to size.

Thinner and stretchy type of denim I wasn’t sure what to expect when I ordered these Elleven Women’s Low Rise Baggy Jeans in the Blue Denim color seeing as the seller’s title claimed these jeans were both wide leg and straight leg. Best way I can describe these jeans is that they are wider than a typical straight leg, but definitely not as wide as typical wide leg jeans. I’m normally a US size large so I ordered these in a size 10 to try. The jeans hug my waist and booty perfectly and then have a wider straight leg all the way to the floor. I’m on the shorter side, being only 5ft 3in and these pants do bunch up a tad on the floor, but nothing that rolling the pants up once couldn’t fix. I will say that these are a thinner more stretchy denim and not your typical non-stretch heavy weight denim, making them nice to wear on warmer days. But because they are thinner, I’m not sure how well they’ll keep me warm during the winter here in the Midwest US. In the end I do like these stretchy jeans. When referring to the thickness of the material, these jeans aren’t exactly what I imagine when I think of denim. This thinner type of denim always makes me a little leery of the quality and if they’ll hold up in the long run. But because of how well they fit my frame, I’ll be keeping and wearing them.

Great pair of jeans The jeans are VERY comfortable. They have a lot of stretch and fit very nicely. My only complaint is the length, but to no fault of the jeans. I'm pretty short - 5'3" so I step on them which I'm used to. I do wish they had different lengths becasuew I really love the style and look of them. They feel like they are good quality too. I have no complaints. I did deduct 1 star because I think they are a bit pricey, but then again I usually buy my jeans from Ross, TJ Maxx, etc.

Right amount of flare, fitted upper, material not as soft or stretchy as I hoped for. These capris jeans are fitted at the waist and buttocks, with the right amount of flare that flows into a wide leg. I am 5'2" and they fall a few inches above my ankle, so they're more like ankle jeans on me. The fit is comfortable. I am a size 16 and ordered the XL. However, if I were a size 18 I'd recommend sizing up as they are a little tight when pulling up over the hips. They aren't as soft or stretchy as I thought they might be, which is why I didn't size up initially, thinking there would be more stretch. It states not to put them in the dryer, but I'm not sure why. In the rinse cycle, I put a little vinegar to soften them but with an air dry, they're a little stiff. The craftsmanship is ok, but there were a few loose threads on them when they arrived and the white material used for the front pockets feels cheap. Also, I ordered the powder blue but they were closer to medium blue. All in, for this price point, they're not bad. They cute & comfortable and I'll certainly wear them this winter as I live in a warm climate. I do like the wide leg that really does come in with the right amount of flare.

The craftsmanship is ok, but there were a few loose threads on them when they arrived and the white material used for the front pockets feels cheap. Also, I ordered the powder blue but they were closer to medium blue. All in, for this price point, they're not bad. They cute & comfortable and I'll certainly wear them this winter as I live in a warm climate. I do like the wide leg that really does come in with the right amount of flare.

Lee Women's Ultra Lux Comfort Any Wear Straight Leg Pant First the stats: I am almost 70, 5’4”, waist 27”, hips38”,inseam 29”, 112lbs. AI suggested size 8. I like my waist band a little loose because of a back issue. I probably should have gotten a 6. These are a little bit big; just a bit. I will definitely need to tuck in my shirt to help hold up the pants. I’ll probably use a belt as well. The rise comes even with my navel.They fit like a nice pair of slacks. I will be able to wear these when playing tour guide to visiting friends and I can wear a merino wool base layer underneath without feeling uncomfortable. I live in the Colorado mountains and it can get pretty cold. The length is what I like. The legs reach the top of my shoes. The fabric is very nice. Not thin. Pockets are a decent size and don’t show through the fabric. Rear pockets are fake but I don’t ever use those when pants have real ones. The sewn in crease makes them look dressy. I am satisfied with these pants and will keep them. If I find they are too big after wearing them for a while I will run a little bit of elastic through the waistband. I would recommend these pants if you want to look nice in cold weather.

Lee Women's Ultra Lux Comfort Any Wear Straight Leg Pant Before you look at my photos, keep in mind that I am an overweight (size 16/XL) senior citizen. I think these fit me perfectly. I rarely wear pull-on pants because for some reason they always slip down on me, so adding belt loops to pull-on pants was a genius move on the part of the designer. I am 5’7” tall and usually wear a 31” length, but based on other reviews which mention that they shrink, I ordered the 33” length and I love the way the pants buckle onto my shoes. I ordered these EMMIOL Women's Flare Jeans in the (Dark Blue-007, Medium) and I LOVE THEM! They are super cute and they fit me well. For reference, I am 5'5ish, 150ish pounds, 34D bust and 28" waist. Let me lay out my body negatives so you know just how awesome these wide leg jeans are. I'm 5'3 weighing 180lbs, short legs & short torso. I have a solid athletic build with a firm muffin-top and small fupa. I carry most of my weight in my stomach and breast. I'm never without shapewear on; most times two of them on. I purchased a medium in these, the perfect boot cut denim stretch jeans, and boy are they comfortable. At first when I pulled them from the package, the waist looked really small, esp in comparison to the nice wide leg and ample bottom part. So of course I tried them on without shapewear just to see how much stretch was in the waist part. I was able to button them, but not comfortably. I knew they would be perfect with my shapewear on. I ordered the 'wased black'; I love the faded look. The stretch on these jeans is a nice firm stretch. And because they are not really denim material, they are not heavy like denim, but sturdy enough to still feel like a great pair of jeans. The best part, they got my booty looking great. I absolutely love these jeans, so I plan on getting two more pairs.

Update the very next day. I changed my four stars and gave all five stars. I had quite a bit of errands to run today getting in and out of the car, bending, turning etc. The belly area that was too tight with the buttons stretched out perfectly, which is not a lot but just enough and the jeans stayed extremely comfortable and in place the entire day. I never had to readjust or lift them up at all. I literally had them on from 11:00 a.m. this morning and just took them off about 20 minutes ago which is 9:00 p.m.. WITHOUT ANY GIRDLE etc. Extremely comfortable and I will be buying another pair in a different color. I'm very thankful that I decided to go with the size chart recommendation instead of my normal size 16.1st bought review. I really like these alot. I am 5'7" 200lbs with a waist of 43" and stomach of 36". I went with the 14 based on the size chart and other reviews recommending to size up. But, I usually wear a 16 and the size chart suggested 14. They fit perfectly in the legs, thighs and butt. Nice and snug exactly where I want it. They are a bit tight in the belly, though. (I have to suck the stomach in to button up.) They do also give a bit of a camel-toe image but not too uncomfortably and I always wear longer shirts anyway so it doesn't stand out. If I had gone up a size, to my normal 16, they would've been too big around the legs, thigh and butt so I will try wearing a girdle to hold in the belly. (Losing weight is not that easy for me ... no matter what I try) The length is spot on and perfectly tight at the ankle. The material is seriously comfortably soft. The pockets are as they should be on any jeans. When I do wash them, I will use the 'light' wash mode and on cold. Hopefully, they won't shrink. If they do, no girdle will help me button up. I have many errands to run tomorrow so I plan on giving these jeans a test run. I will revise my review (with photos) after that.

If I had gone up a size, to my normal 16, they would've been too big around the legs, thigh and butt so I will try wearing a girdle to hold in the belly. (Losing weight is not that easy for me ... no matter what I try) The length is spot on and perfectly tight at the ankle. The material is seriously comfortably soft. The pockets are as they should be on any jeans. When I do wash them, I will use the 'light' wash mode and on cold. Hopefully, they won't shrink. If they do, no girdle will help me button up. I have many errands to run tomorrow so I plan on giving these jeans a test run. I will revise my review (with photos) after that.

I love these capri jeans! I got the X-Large size, my normal size, and they fit nicely. I ordered these “lakeside color” jeans because I wanted something different. I have long jeans, jean shorts, and capris, but no cropped wide-leg denim for summer. At this price point, I had fairly low expectations… but these feel comfortable as all get out. :) First, the S T R E T C H. The elastane blend makes these incredibly comfortable and forgiving, especially through the waist. If you’re like me and have gained a midlife belly, these accommodate a pooch without digging in or feeling restrictive. They’re almost, almost as comfortable as sweatpants. I wear a longer shirt to hide my gut, but I pulled it up a bit in the photo to help you see the S T R E T C H. Fit notes: • I’m 5’5” and the inseam hits slightly cropped on me; not overly short, just a relaxed cropped length. • True to size based on the seller’s chart. • High waist with button fly gives a secure feel. • Wide leg cut is easy to wear and doesn’t cling to thighs or knees. Fabric & feel: The cotton-poly-elastane blend gives structure while still feeling soft and flexible. They move easily throughout the day, which makes them ideal for casual wear, errands, or everyday summer outfits. Style expectations: These jeans, especially in the lakeside color, would NOT be my polished, dark dressy denim, but that’s not what I bought them for. These are the jeans you reach for constantly because they’re comfortable, relaxed, and easy to style! The comfort and wearability exceeded my expectations for this bargain value. I expect these to become one of my most worn casual pieces this season.

I really loved the quality of this Women's Denim Dress—it is thick and heavy, which gives it a substantial feel. The dress is described as a babydoll fit, but I found it to have a more awkward A-line shape. There is a photo where the model pulls the dress to the sides to show its shape, but unfortunately, the dress retained a "Christmas tree" silhouette on me. I was able to use a pin on the inside to adjust the shape somewhat. I ordered my typical medium size (I am 5'4", 135 lbs, 36 band, square shape). In hindsight, I probably should have sized down to a small, but I was concerned the shoulders and chest area would be too tight. The fringe detail by the buttons tends to stand up awkwardly, which detracts a bit from the overall look. A few care notes: be sure to wash the dress separately and even twice, as a lot of color bleeds out in the wash. Unfortunately, there is a noticeable smell to the dress that does not come out even after three washes. It’s not unpleasant or sour, but definitely noticeable and a bit off-putting. Overall, while the dress is well-made and substantial, the fit and lingering smell make me less likely to reach for it often.

This dress was super cute in photos, but ended looking pretty unflattering on me in person. I'm not sure if its my height (5'1") or what, but it just made me look boxy and old fashioned. The dress itself is well made with quality stitching and hems, and I love the ruffles on the buttons and around the sleeves. If you're fashionable I'm sure you could style this in a way that's cute! This denim dress is such impressive quality and truly looks expensive! It’s soft, lightweight, and surprisingly breathable — I expected it to be heavy since it’s denim, but the 82% cotton and 18% polyester blend makes it light without feeling thin. It’s sturdy enough to wear with boots in the fall and winter, and the sleeves are absolutely lovely. The A-line shape is super flattering and doesn’t draw attention to the midsection, which I really appreciate. I’m 5’6” and it hits right above the knees. Overall, such a beautiful, comfortable, and versatile dress! I’ve already gotten compliments on it! True to size!

I’m 5’3, 265lbs. I love these! The fabric looks more like denim than any other legging/jegging I’ve tried. They have just the right amount of stretch, they aren’t too thin or too thick, and I’ve washed them a half dozen times and so far they’ve held their shape. I love that the waistband is slightly wide, but still thin and flexible. I’ve had multiple abdominal surgeries so I don’t like really thick waistbands or any kind of hardware digging in. Being a larger lady I have always hidden myself behind baggy tops and pants. Someone advised me to try cropped jeggings for a change and I’m so glad I did. These are lovely! user_comment: I wasn't expecting top quality for the price, but these were so awful in so many ways that I don't think they're worth $1. The material feels very cheap and there isn't much stretch to the fabric. There's also these very odd puckers of extra fabric on the outside of the hips and on the inseam in the crotch area, which looks ridiculous. I'm 5'4", 140lbs and got the large size capris because I wanted a looser fit, but these were slightly snug in the waist and loose around the thighs, especially with that extra pucker of fabric. Also, these were not capri length on me. I have short legs and a long torso and, as you can see, they go down almost to my ankles. I'd have to roll them up many times to get the length I want, but the fabric isn't stretchy enough and is too snug around the lower legs to do this. Finally, there are back pockets, but the front pockets are fake. And be mindful of the tag that warns about bleeding dye even after washing. Given all of these faults, I wouldn't recommend these to anyone. There's really nothing positive to say about them. Don't waste your money.

user_comment: These jeans are 75% cotton and the rest stretchy, so they're almost as comfortable as yoga pants. The decorative stitching on the side seams gives them some pizzazz. My husband immediately noticed that they were new jeans and said they looked great (he doesn't usually notice new clothes!) The zipper is a lighter fast-fashion-quality zipper, I do wish it were a little stronger, but otherwise I'm delighted with these. I wore them all day comfortably without once thinking "I can't wait to get out of these jeans and into some yoga pants when I get home". I doubt that anyone would look at the style of these and think "I'll get those for baling hay", but just in case ... these are definitely town jeans, they're not barn jeans. The fabric is a lighter weight and they aren't sturdy/protective/suited for barn or field work. They're a little longer than my usual jeans too, which works great worn with heels. I'm 5'5" and wear a size 16.

The images I took don't reflect the true color of these "pecan" colored jeans. They appear lighter in person than in the images online with a weathered look. But I love the actual color, because it is a more modern looking brown. The legs are pretty much the same wide width from top to bottom (on the Large size I got). I'm short and knew these would be too long for me with a 30 inseam, but I cut off a couple inches to wear with raw hem, and they fit perfectly now. These Grapent jeans are soft and have plenty of stretch to them making them very comfortable to wear. The pockets on the front and back are patch pockets but hold items well. There's plenty of detail around the waistline but no added bulk. I really like these jeans! They feel soft, but not too thin.

I ordered these jeans because I like the way women's jeans fit so much nicer than mens on me. I'm 6'/173 and have a athletic body, so I ordered a medium, which fit perfectly! The length is perfect for tall people and the stretch in the legs and waist, is enough so they don't constrict, but they also don't move up and down as you move around. The material is light weight and thin, yet feel like reshape jeans material when wearing them. The butt area is very plain with no designs or embellishments, but has two tiny pockets for a small phone/etc. Overall, a very nice pair of skinny jeans for men. They fit well and look really nice, but the price is way too high in my opinion. There are many other name brand jeans at almost half the cost.

I'm a fan of Roswear denim! I like their shorts and I recently ordered and love a denim jacket! I have been wearing thei shorts since early Spring of this year and I own enough of them to wear them on a fairly consistent basis throughout the warmer months (okay... I wear them EVERY day unless I need to dress better for some reason). So when I saw that they made skinny jeans, I was THRILLED! And now that I've received them, I still am! First, let me explain the fit you see in my photos... The looseness of them is by design. I am a VERY typical size Small. At 5'6" and fluctuating between 118 to 124 pounds, I can manipulate the fit of clothes from a pair of pants that are meant to be deliberately tight to look semi relaxed on me by simply ordering up to a Medium. and that's exactly what I've done here on purpose. I had this idea that if I order skinny jeans in a medium, and being knowledgeable of the brand, I might end up with a gene that has a style I really enjoy, but a fit that I prefer. I think it worked in this case! The only drawback is that the fit between the waist and the bottom of the crotch is a bit longer than I would like, but as I will likely be wearing longer sweaters, I can really just pull my pants up a little higher and no one will notice. 😊 However, if you like what you see in the brand's ad, you should order your typical size and I can tell you with a high degree of certainty they will fit exactly as described. And they will look amazing like that as well. I just have enough super-skinny jeans AND wider-legged baggy jeans, and wanted something sort of in between. "A skinny cut with a relaxed fit." If you'd like something more classic like that, order a size up and you shall have it! Rest assured, Roswear denim high quality! I love the texture, the weight, and the amount of stretch offered. Their denim is super classic looking and updated enough for the latest styles. While I cannot bring myself to subtract a star for this because it's very common these days, there is a slight chemical odor when receiving new jeans from this company. It is the typical chemical odor you get with jeans that are imported. I think it has something to do with the packaging and, it's not super strong. And after one or two washes it's gone anyway. But folks need to be aware that there is an odor and if that bothers you you should not order these. It just doesn't bother me. these jeans are worth it because it's too hard to find a decent fit and style in jeans online to worry about something so minor that is gone after a few hours or washes anyway. So there you have it! I am so pleased that this company decided to produce these skinny jeans! I will continue to like them a little more relaxed for my own taste, but I'm sure they look fantastic as "tight" skinny jeans as well! Please just remember that I ordered a size up on purpose and that you do not need to size down. Order your typical size. Well done, Roswear!!

Styles can come and go but there’s nothing like a great pair of skinny jeans after you’ve lost a few pounds to make you feel like a million bucks! I was worried that these wouldn’t fit right because how in the world are you supposed to make a skinny jeans in S, M, L, and XL sizes? They should be form fitting to everyone’s individual body style. However, I ordered a large and it fit great! Really great, actually. They hug in all the right places and stretch where you need them too. I was worried about buying mid-waist jeans but that wasn’t a problem either. They come all the way up and don’t feel like they’re slipping down my hips at all. For the record, I’m 5’7”, weigh 158lbs and I ordered a Large. This is my regular size so feel free to order your regular size as well.

I'm a big fan of Roswear and own several pairs of their denim shorts in various cuts and colors, so I was really excited to give these skinny jeans a try. At 5'5" and 180 lbs I'm normally an XL in the shorts, so that's the size I grabbed for these jeans. They were definitely too big on me though. Probably could've gotten away with a large, especially since the skinny jean look is supposed to be more fitted and close-hugging. That's on me for grabbing the wrong size so of course I'm not gonna deduct any stars for that. The jeans themselves are great quality, super soft, and stretchy just like all my Roswear shorts. The distressed look is especially cute on the black pair for a more casual punk vibe.

These are my new favorite jeans! I absolutely love them. For reference, I got a size small. I weight 140lbs and am 5’5”. They couldn’t possibly fit any more perfect! The material is soft and very stretchy, and they are the most comfortable skinny jeans I currently own. They go up to just barely below my belly button. They fit nicely around my waist, not too tight, but not too loose. They’re the perfect length, but there’s just enough extra that they’d work for someone taller as well. They are definitely longer on the bottom for me than they are in the picture of the model, but that’s how I prefer them. I’m often picky about how jeans fit around my butt and waist, but these are extremely flattering and well made. I’m totally going to get more in the other colors. Overall, I couldn’t be happier. They’re a great value for the price!

Roswear Skinny Jeans Mid Rise Ripped Slim Fit Distressed Jeans, COLOR Blue, SIZE Large: I’m 5’2”, 174 lbs and normally wear a large or 10/12. The large fits but is a tad big because these stretch. I can pull these on and off without unbuttoning or zipping. I’m hoping they shrink a little. I like the color and quality. The material is a little thick, like good old-fashioned jeans used to be. The pockets are amazing because they are real pockets! These jeans look great with high knee boots. The quality is very good. Good value! Would recommend.

I had one pair of the black pants for 4 years, and I liked them so much I ended up buying two more pairs, another black and the granite grey in the picture. They give the illusion of a dress pant but are so comfortable and I get compliments at work all the time. I wear them almost every day. This is the XL size without being washed. They shrink just a tad in length (I always use low heat) but I will stretch them out when wet and air dry if I want them a little longer when wearing a heel. They rise right after my belly button and are stretchy and comfy over my tummy. I am 200lbs, 5'6 size XL. They are amazing pants!

I have these pants in black and blue and I love them! They are so comfortable and you dress them up or down. I love them so much I decided to order them in gray also. For some odd reason, the exact same pair of pants in a different color are significantly longer than my other 2 pair. To the point that I am tripping on them when not wearing shoes. When I am wearing shoes they still touch the ground. I am 5'5" and the other 2 pair I have are the perfect length. I lost the return window by a day so I'm stuck with them. Now I'm worried that if I buy another pair they will also be too long. If you are a little taller than me, they may be the perfect length. It's just odd that I have 3 pairs in the same size and these are longer than the other 2. ** Update** I liked the color enough that I gave the first gray pair I bought to my daughter, who is 5" taller than me and took my chances and ordered another pair. (The length was perfect for her and she 5'10".) The second pair was also too long, so it's clearly that color.

These fit perfectly for length and fit. 5’6, 125 lbs, long torso and these were just as pictured. The length was good for the spring/fall. The pockets in the front are flattering. They run a little big because I normally am a size 2, but got a 4 in these. They aren’t very thick and are a little stretchy, but that’s fine. It’s very hard to find the right length and rise, but these fit the bill.

I ordered these jeans because I've been looking for a nice pair of wide leg jeans. I was extremely pleasantly surprised when I put them on and they fit like they were made for me. They were a bit long, but with a little taller shoe, they were the perfect length for me (note - I'm 5'2", so most jeans need hemmed even with taller shoes). They have just enough stretch to be comfortable, but don't look stretched out at the end of a long day of wearing them. I will definitely buy these jeans again.

Sometimes I like to take a fashion risk, and these cropped, ruffled jeans are that in my book. Firstly, they are a nice, lightweight denim- not so thin they feel like jammie pants, but good for warmer to hot weather. The material does not have any stretch to it, but it's not stiff. They were a little tighter than the size chart would have indicated, and to get the very loose, boho look, I would order up a size. They are accurately represented in the photos in the listing, although the grey is a very dark grey that looks like faded black. There is an odd seam below the knee, again, it's a style choice, but I didn't notice it until I got the pants. I'm 5'2", and they hit me just above my ankle, not all that cropped for a petite but I'm used to that. I just can't decide if they are cool or ridiculous...maybe it will depend on how I'm feeling. I think these would be really cute with a slouchy tank and flip-flops or sandals in the summer.

I really like these jeans. The high waist is fantastic, and the material has great stretch and provides good support. They're trendy without being too young, and nice enough to wear to work on casual Fridays. I usually wear a size 14 pant. I ordered these in size 13 per Amazon's suggested size, and the fit is very good. I do have a little bit of trouble with the last few teeth of the zipper not closing, but it's not too bad and it still stays up. I'm 5'6", and I'm very happy with the length. They hit right at the top of my ankle. I also really like the raw hem. I would definitely recommend these jeans. The quality is good and they're very comfortable and true to size.

I think this top is super cute layered on top of another shirt. I wouldn't wear it by itself because it seems more cropped on me than it does in the photos. I'm 5'10"132 lbs 34E. I ordered a M. It fits great with plenty of room. I was worried it might be too big since it's oversized, but I like the fit. I probably could have also worn a Small, but I like the extra length since I'm tall. The material is a soft, thin denim. I got medium blue and the color description is spot on. The cuff is really wide, but it buttons above it, so I like how it looks when I turn it up rather than wearing them wider. I debated between this color and the lighter color- I may order the lighter one too. I'm happy with what I received.

Well, the leggings are comfortable. I’m 5’3 and they come up high on my waist. They don’t really seem to lift the butt, and the pockets seem weird. But those gold buttons on the pockets throw the look off….

user_comment: I ordered these wide leg jeans because I remember wearing these in my teenage years and how good they looked. I tried them on and loved how they feel. They look like real blue jeans and are very comfortable. They have a little bit of stretch because it has some spandex in them. I got the blue color and really love the color. These look high quality and I love the pockets and then each side has an adjustable button that you can adjust to fit your waist. These are true to size in everything but the length. I’m 5’3” 180 lbs and got the XL as per the size guide. The only thing I don’t like about these jeans are unless you have a flat belly these are not attractive. I have an apron belly and these really enhanced my belly. I rated a 4 star because I think for the person without a belly they would be great but for those of us with that pooch this style is not flattering.

The SXIDECGQI Women's Baggy Mid Low Waist Jeans Wide Straight Leg Frayed Raw Hem Loose Boyfriends Denim Jeans are perfection! The wide straight leg is flattering and elongates the legs. There is no stretch, and they are incredibly comfortable. They are higher rise on me and not mid-low. They do not ride down when I squat. The hem is a raw cut with some intentional distressing. Because it is a raw hem, if they are too long for you, you can cut them off shorter, though I would wash them first, as they are 100% cotton and could experience some shrinkage. At the time of this review, they are listed at $37.99, and they are worth every penny. For reference, I am 5'1", 143 lbs, 28-29-inch waist, and I ordered a small. (Worth noting that I am wearing a 3" heel in the pictures)

I am wearing the size small and I am 5’3, 140 lbs and my lower measurements are 27-36. They fit but the material had no give at all around the waist/hip area. And these are not low waist. They sat pretty high up on me. Their only saving grace is the bagginess of the leg. Thankfully these are baggy in the thigh area and down so I was able to move in them but they are definitely tight in the booty area. These are nice pants for women who are not curvy. But for my curvy girls, find another pair of loose fit jeans that have some give in the material. Overall, they are very well made and the jean quality is great but they are not for fuller figured women.
reviewer_name_raw: These have no give at all

I was a teen when baggy jeans first became popular so I was pretty psyched to try these out. They are okay. I am a true medium and this medium seems to be the right fit for me (5’1/149 lbs). They are very long on me..to be fair, I am on the short side, so that’s not a huge surprise…so I definitely can’t wear these without some type of heeled shoe. I included pics with and without heeled shoes to show the difference. The length doesn't bother me as much as the way the jeans fit under my backside. It feels like it was purposely stitched to give me a permanent wedgie. I believe it is meant to pull the booty up for the look, but I just can’t. It really stays like that no matter how much I try to adjust it out! I like that they designed the back of the jeans to be stretchy at the waist, but it kind of looks unattractive to me if i wear it with a shirt tucked in. The material of the jeans is thick and seemingly well-made, so I definitely believe they will last. Priced right around 30 bucks is very reasonable, especially for jeans. They may be a better fit/look for a different body type, I just don’t think it’s quite right for me.
reviewer_name_raw: Not the most flattering jeans—permanent wedgie

I'm 165 lbs and 5'7, and I carry my weight in my mid-section. I bought these just to see; had zero expectations because the reviews were mixed. So here are some photos and some of my info. I'm 5'7 so these are just the right ankle length for me. Very, very stretchy overall, the waistband is comfortable and not snug on me, it just lies perfectly flat and doesn't create a muffin top. It is true jean material with a lot of stretch. They might loosen up as the day progresses but haven't noticed it yet. The color I purchased was OffShore Blue and it is perfectly mid-light wash.

I ordered the GRAPENT Straight Leg Jeans for Women Trendy Pull On High Waisted Cropped Elastic Waist Stretchy Denim Pants Ankle Jeans in “gentle sea blue.” I’m loving the great quality and heavy duty denim of the ankle jeans. The fit is great- even better than some of my expensive, zipperer-fly jeans! For elasticized waist with the faux zipper I’m very impressed at the great fit, feel and look of these jeans. I ordered large and they fit my 160lb, 5’6 body & inseam like they’d been tailored for me explicitly! I got the light blue with the whitewash bcuz I felt it gave summertime vibes being so light blue. These are form fitting, straight legged which I really like bcuz you have some versatility in cuffing the ankles and wearing a capri look rather than strictly always jeans. I did notice a mildew smell when I opened the package… going to wash them and if it doesn’t go away I will note to my review. I love them!

I’m reviewing 2 different pair. The first is the color “Reef Blue” in a size XL. I am typically a size 12-14 in jeans. I love that they’re high waisted, on the thinner side but not too thin to where you can see lumps and bumps. I am very hippy with saddle bags and currently sporting the menopausal gut. I read that these jeans are stretchy and I considered buying them in a Large but knowing my hip/butt/saddle bags I would’ve ran the risk of pulling at the pockets. I assume had I bought the Large, that pulling would’ve lessened due to the stretch of the material so I may order a second pair in a different color and in a large. I’ve read that they’re a heavy Jean and they are not. Unless other colors are made with different materials. These pants are great! If I didn’t have the wider butt I would’ve (and possibly still could) wear the size large. The color is a faded like color blue with a cream stitching. These color jeans look very different in each picture I took due to lighting that’s why I included the close up of the ankle area, it’s the true color. I hope this helps! I’m 180 and 5’6ish.The 2nd pair is “medium blue” in a size large. They were snug on me and I considered keeping them as I know they’ll stretch out throughout the day however, I did not like the dark color with the lighter stitching. The stitching stood out too much for my liking. I didn’t want each pocket or zipper seam to stand out, if that makes sense. Also, they were clearly purchased before me and had been washed but not fully dried. They were still damp when I took them out of the bag. Do better amazon. So now after purchasing two pair I will keep the original XL and return the wet size large.

I read that these jeans are stretchy and I considered buying them in a Large but knowing my hip/butt/saddle bags I would’ve ran the risk of pulling at the pockets. I assume had I bought the Large, that pulling would’ve lessened due to the stretch of the material so I may order a second pair in a different color and in a large. I’ve read that they’re a heavy Jean and they are not. Unless other colors are made with different materials. These pants are great! If I didn’t have the wider butt I would’ve (and possibly still could) wear the size large. The color is a faded like color blue with a cream stitching. These color jeans look very different in each picture I took due to lighting that’s why I included the close up of the ankle area, it’s the true color. I hope this helps! I’m 180 and 5’6ish.The 2nd pair is “medium blue” in a size large. They were snug on me and I considered keeping them as I know they’ll stretch out throughout the day however, I did not like the dark color with the lighter stitching. The stitching stood out too much for my liking. I didn’t want each pocket or zipper seam to stand out, if that makes sense. Also, they were clearly purchased before me and had been washed but not fully dried. They were still damp when I took them out of the bag. Do better amazon. So now after purchasing two pair I will keep the original XL and return the wet size large.

These jeans are very stretchy. I ordered a large according to their size-chart. I'm 5'9 and 145 pounds. I wish I would have gotten a medium because these feel a little slouchy/baggy. They are very nice jeans. No problem sitting down because of the stretch and the high waist. The black color is a wash - so they have a worn-in look. There is also some whisking going on.I give these five stars - and I ALMOST took a star off for the smell. The off-gassing is pretty serious. I had to leave them outside for 3 days to dilute the smell. Then I washed them in vinegar AND put them in the freezer.

These wide-leg jeans totally surprised me! The high waist is super flattering, and the stretchy denim makes them so comfortable to wear all day. The stretch in them is perfect, with the fit being SO comfortable, hugging perfectly, without being too tight, or too loose. I am always skeptical of buying jeans because of the fit, and these jeans were totally amazing! They were Super long, but I cut them and was considering fraying the bottom, but they looked so nice that I decided to machine hem them. I love the classic look with the modern twist, and the slash pockets are a convenient and cute touch. I am 5'0" 114 lbs, and ordered a size small, and except for the length (which I almost always have to hem any pants I buy), they fit me to a T! A must-have for any wardrobe!

AUTOMET Women Summer Tops Spring Fashion 2026 Lace Long Sleeve Shirts Fall Sweaters Dressy Casual Tunic Blouse Work Clothing This review is for the AUTOMET long-sleeve top in size Large, color “Apricot.” The material is soft, stretchy and the overall style could be very flattering on certain body types, but it didn’t work well for me. The fabric is extremely thin and quite see-through (as shown in the photos), and it really emphasizes areas I prefer to keep smoothed out, especially my love handles and “muffin tops”. It does fit true to size, and the sleeves are beautiful, but the open-knit areas make my bra straps very visible, which I didn’t love. For reference, I’m 5’5”, 175 lbs, and wear a 36D. This top would probably work best for someone who doesn’t need extra coverage or prefers a lightweight, sheer look.
